choices: They need to get and study some humans?
1.content:
Deep in a large, isolated cave deep underground, hundreds of thousands of large eggs are about to hatch in about a month. A smaller group of a hundred eggs will hatch in several days. Protecting these defenseless eggs are a small group of sixty adults. A mixed group of five winged commanders, twenty wingless warriors, and the rest are breeding winged females. The sixty adults have been awake for ten years. In that time their leader, a winged commander named Colossus, the biggest, curious, highly intelligent, and most powerful member of their race gave orders that no member of their kind will go out during the daylight hours to avoid being seen by humans. Nighttime patrols were limited to gathering books, food, tools, and other information about the humans. No gargoyle could engage a human under any circumstance, and no evidence of their existence was to be left behind. The gargoyles under his leadership have grown in knowledge in those ten years, gathering human technology, tools, and even creating their own tech. At this time, they know how to read and speak several human languages. They also found a crashed alien craft deep inside their cave, which gave them access to even more advanced technology.

However, things are about to change.



https://pitsperilous.blogspot.com/2016/0...
1.title: The Beginning.

choices: Team one, heading to a two story farm house?
Team two, heading to a camp of somekind? Nudist, cheerleader, Gymnast you decide
11.content:
Colossus stands on a lookout tower they built high over their third underground city. As he looks over his soon to be growing army, he smiles knowing soon he will be the ruler of this world. In the hatcheries he can see thousands of three feet tall eggs everywhere. He knew soon there would be a war for control of this planet, a war he intends on winning. But he knows he must first gather living human specimens for his scientists to study and experiment on.

He gathers some four-man squads to study the humans in their natural habitat and to capture some living human prisoners for study and other things. He knew there is only so much information they could gather by stealing books and tools. They do not have access to the human’s power grid and their power sources are not compatible with most human electronics. Also, they do not have access to the internet, or any cell phone towers due to their city being underground. Colossus waits till sundown and sends out his squads of warriors to perform their missions.

We follow which teams?
11.title: They need to get and study some humans?

choices: A large family on vacation? Mom, sons, daughters, dad maybe, all white?
A couple or couples camping nearby?
Some youths from a nearby camp?
A military unit scouting out something?
12.content: The humans that get to close are?
12.title: Some humans find them?

info.brief_description: Gargoyles from the 1972 movie are returning, smarter and more powerful then ever.
info.description:
This interactive is about the 1972 movie Gargoyles, not the cartoon. This story can begin at anytime you choose including the 1972 TV movie. It can include non-consensual or consensual sex, giants, shrinking, magic, demons, angels, aliens, anthros, invisibility, time travel and robots.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oeyIodpVQs4 trailer.

https://pitsperilous.blogspot.com/2016/03/the-1972-gargoyles-are-coming.html

Rules

No poop, piss, toe jam, ear wax, farts, human body odors or boogers. Blood or sexual fluids are cool.
No changing a characters age, gender or appearance. Try to keep things consistent.
No endings, if a main character dies, switch to another or new character. Characters can die but try not to kill them to early.
No body swapping, excessive feet worshiping, and please do not suddenly take over a story-line and completely change things around.
No characters under nine years old.
No weight gaining or inflation.

Use third person format.

If you do not like this kind of story, act like an adult, leave.

Feel free to add and have fun. Any questions just ask?
